description: A solemn promise that binds the speaker at the deepest level. Vow encompasses sacred commitment, the transformation of self through sworn word, unbreakable intention, and the understanding that vows shape destiny through dedicated action.
rationale: The word 'nou' combines firm 'no' with complete 'u', creating vowel hiatus only. This firmness-to-wholeness structure captures vow as unwavering commitment reaching completion.
